questions.question: What war did Britain and France fight in the 1750s to control land between their colonies?

What do you call when people refuse to buy something as a form of protest?

What were the five new laws called that the British passed to punish the colonists?

What do you call people who wanted to stay loyal to the King and keep things the same?
What battle gave the British control of New York City?
What battle convinced France to join the war and help the Americans?
What year did the Revolutionary War end?
What holiday celebrated the British leaving New York City on November 25th each year?
Who led the parade through Manhattan on Evacuation Day?
What compromise decided that for every 5 enslaved people, only 3 would be counted in the population?
